general_inquiry.question: Find the second derivative of the following function: $e^{-6 x-6}-\sqrt{1-x}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The second derivative of the function \( e^{-6x - 6} - \sqrt{1 - x} \) is:

\[ 36e^{-6x - 6} - \frac{1}{4 (1 - x)^{3/2}} \]
